name: @thrunt-surfaces/splunk-app
description: THRUNT Surfaces app for Splunk Enterprise / Splunk Cloud

scripts.build: echo 'Splunk apps are packaged as .tar.gz — use: tar czf thrunt-surfaces.tar.gz -C .. splunk-app'
scripts.test: echo 'Splunk app smoke test: validate app.conf exists' && test -f default/app.conf
